auth.label: API Key
auth.description: HERE API key sent as the apiKey query parameter. Create it in HERE Platform Access Manager on an app's Credentials tab: https://platform.here.com/.

actions.name: autocomplete
actions.description: Get HERE address and administrative-area completions for entered text.

q.description: The partial address or administrative-area text to complete.

at.description: The optional HERE location context formatted as latitude,longitude.

in.description: The optional HERE spatial or country filter, such as countryCode:USA.

lang.description: The optional BCP 47 language tag for the response.

limit.description: The maximum number of autocomplete result items to return.

politicalView.description: The optional political view country code used by HERE.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for HERE address autocomplete suggestions.

outputSchema.description: The HERE response containing ordered result items.

actions.name: autosuggest
actions.description: Get HERE query and entity suggestions for incomplete or misspelled address and place text with required spatial context.

at.description: The optional HERE location context formatted as latitude,longitude.

in.description: The optional HERE filter. Use circle:... or bbox:... as spatial context, or countryCode:... together with at.

lang.description: The optional BCP 47 language tag for the response.

limit.description: The maximum number of result items to return.

politicalView.description: The optional political view country code used by HERE.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for HERE Autosuggest query suggestions with required spatial context.

queryTerms.description: The optional HERE completed query terms returned when term completion is requested.

outputSchema.description: The HERE Autosuggest response containing query or entity suggestions.

actions.name: discover
actions.description: Search HERE places or addresses with a free-form Discover query and required spatial context.

at.description: The optional HERE location context formatted as latitude,longitude.

in.description: The optional HERE filter. Use circle:... or bbox:... as spatial context, or countryCode:... together with at.

lang.description: The optional BCP 47 language tag for the response.

limit.description: The maximum number of result items to return.

types.description: The optional comma-separated HERE result type filter.

politicalView.description: The optional political view country code used by HERE.

show.description: The optional comma-separated HERE response enrichment selector.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for HERE Discover free-form place or address search with required spatial context.

outputSchema.description: The HERE response containing ordered result items.

actions.name: geocode
actions.description: Geocode a free-form address, place, locality, or administrative-area query with HERE Geocoding and Search API v7.

lang.description: The optional BCP 47 language tag for the response.

limit.description: The maximum number of result items to return.

in.description: The optional HERE spatial or country filter, such as countryCode:USA.

at.description: The optional HERE location context formatted as latitude,longitude.

types.description: The optional comma-separated HERE result type filter.

politicalView.description: The optional political view country code used by HERE.

show.description: The optional comma-separated HERE response enrichment selector.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for geocoding a HERE address, place, locality, or administrative area query.

outputSchema.description: The HERE response containing ordered result items.

actions.name: lookup
actions.description: Look up a HERE place or location object by an identifier returned from another HERE search result.

id.description: The HERE result identifier returned by geocode, reverse geocode, discover, or autocomplete.

lang.description: The optional BCP 47 language tag for the response.

show.description: The optional comma-separated HERE response enrichment selector.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for looking up a HERE place or location object by identifier.

title.description: The representative title for the HERE object.

id.description: The HERE identifier for the returned object.

resultType.description: The HERE result type for the returned object, when present.

position.description: The HERE WGS84 position object, when present.

actions.name: reverse_geocode
actions.description: Find the nearest HERE address or place result for a latitude,longitude location.

at.description: The HERE location to reverse geocode, formatted as latitude,longitude.

lang.description: The optional BCP 47 language tag for the response.

limit.description: The maximum number of result items to return.

types.description: The optional comma-separated HERE result type filter.

politicalView.description: The optional political view country code used by HERE.

show.description: The optional comma-separated HERE response enrichment selector.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for reverse geocoding a HERE latitude,longitude location.

outputSchema.description: The HERE response containing ordered result items.
